review:
Bella Prana is clean and welcoming. Parking is across the street, behind the building, and on the street and I have never had a problem finding a spot. 

What brings me to Bella is not only the warm (lighting and fish tank adds a nice touch) environment, but an instructor, Lisa.  Lisa Wilson is, hands down, the best prenatal, baby, toddler, family yoga instructor in Tampa Bay. I live in St Petersburg, but drive to South Tampa because my 2 yo son LOVES Lisa and her class. She makes yoga fun for the kids and has a lot of singing and movement (aka bonding time with your little ones). Lisa is also a fabulous prenatal  yoga instructor and creates a nice, relaxing, and supportive environment for all the hormonally-driven pregnant women who just need some "me time"...with backaches, cankles, and all!
